Class Cart

java.lang.Object
order.Cart
public class Cart extends Object
Cart, array of products and packs the user has not paid yet

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Cart()
    Creates a cart with default modification date (today)
    Cart(boolean assignedExpired, LocalDate assignedModificationDate)
    Creates a new cart without content
    Cart(List<StoreProduct> assignedProducts, List<Pack> assignedPacks, boolean assignedExpired, LocalDate assignedModificationDate)
    Creates a new cart

  • Constructor Details

    • Cart

      public Cart(List<StoreProduct> assignedProducts, List<Pack> assignedPacks, boolean assignedExpired, LocalDate assignedModificationDate)
      Creates a new cart
      Parameters:
      assignedProducts - , the store products
      assignedPacks - , the packs
      assignedExpired - , whether it's expired
      assignedModificationDate - , the last modification date

    • Cart

      public Cart(boolean assignedExpired, LocalDate assignedModificationDate)
      Creates a new cart without content
      Parameters:
      assignedExpired - , whether it's expired
      assignedModificationDate - , the last modification date

    • Cart

      public Cart()
      Creates a cart with default modification date (today)

  • Method Details

    • calculatePrice

      public double calculatePrice()
      It calculates the price of the cart
      Returns:
      the cart's price

    • cancelProduct

      public void cancelProduct(StoreProduct toCancel)
      It cancels a product in the cart
      Parameters:
      toCancel - the store product to cancel

    • cancelPack

      public void cancelPack(Pack p)
      It cancels a pack in the cart
      Parameters:
      p - the pack to cancel

    • addProduct

      public void addProduct(StoreProduct wanted)
      Adds a product to the cart
      Parameters:
      wanted - the store product to add

    • addPack

      public boolean addPack(Pack wanted)
      Adds a pack to the cart
      Parameters:
      wanted - the pack to add
      Returns:
      true if the pack was added, false if else

    • payOrder

      public boolean payOrder() throws es.uam.eps.padsof.telecard.InvalidCardNumberException, es.uam.eps.padsof.telecard.FailedInternetConnectionException, es.uam.eps.padsof.telecard.OrderRejectedException
      It pays the cart
      Returns:
      true if the cart was paid, if not a message will be printed
      Throws:
      es.uam.eps.padsof.telecard.InvalidCardNumberException - the card number wasn't valid
      es.uam.eps.padsof.telecard.FailedInternetConnectionException - the Internet connection failed
      es.uam.eps.padsof.telecard.OrderRejectedException - the order was rejected

    • printProducts

      public void printProducts()
      It prints a cart's product's basic info

    • printPacks

      public void printPacks()
      It prints a cart's pack's basic info

    • cleanupOldProducts

      public void cleanupOldProducts()
      It removes the products and packs that have expired

    • calculateExpiredDate

      public LocalDate calculateExpiredDate(StoreProduct sproducts)
      It calculates the expired date of the product
      Parameters:
      sproducts - the store product in the cart
      Returns:
      the date of expiration

    • calculateExpiredDatePacks

      public LocalDate calculateExpiredDatePacks(Pack pack)
      It calculates the expired date of the packs
      Parameters:
      pack - the pack in the cart
      Returns:
      the date of expiration

    • printStoreProductListPage

      public void printStoreProductListPage(int pageNum)
      It prints a sub-list of the cart's store products according to the desired page
      Parameters:
      pageNum - the desired page's number

    • printPackListPage

      public void printPackListPage(int pageNum)
      It prints a sub-list of the cart's packs according to the desired page
      Parameters:
      pageNum - the desired page's number

      public LocalDate getCreationDate()
      Obtains the creation date of the cart
      Returns:
      the cart's creation date

    • getExpired

      public boolean getExpired()
      Obtains whether the cart is expired
      Returns:
      true if the cart has expired, false if else

      public void setExpired(boolean exp)
      Sets whether the cart is expired
      Parameters:
      exp - true if the cart has expired, false if else

      public LocalDate getModificationDate()
      Obtains the last modification date of the cart
      Returns:
      the modification date

      public void setModificationDate(LocalDate ld)
      Sets the modification date
      Parameters:
      ld - the local date of modification

      public int getPackMaxPageNum()
      It gets the maximum number of pages that can be obtained from the cart's pack list
      Returns:
      the maximum number of pages that can be obtained from the cart's pack list

      Obtains the amount of products in the cart
